heading: Liquidated damages withheld from contractors under chapter 37 of title 40
label: 1499 Liquidated damages withheld from contractors under chapter 37 of title 40
text: The United States Court of Federal Claims shall have jurisdiction to render judgment upon any claim for liquidated damages withheld from a contractor or subcontractor under .section 3703 of title 40
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on , U.S.C., 1940 ed., Public Buildings, Property and Works (, ).section 324 of title 40June 19, 1912, ch. 174, § 137 Stat. 137This section contains only the jurisdictional provision in the last clause of , U.S.C., 1940 ed.section 324 of title 40Changes in phraseology were made.

Amendments2006— substituted “chapter 37 of title 40” for “Contract Work Hours and Safety Standards Act” in section catchline.Pub. L. 109–2842002— substituted “” for “section 104 of the Contract Work Hours and Safety Standards Act”.Pub. L. 107–217section 3703 of title 401992— substituted “United States Court of Federal Claims” for “United States Claims Court”.Pub. L. 102–5721990— substituted “Hours and Safety Standards” for “Hours Standards” in text.Pub. L. 101–6501982— substituted “Contract Work Hours and Safety Standards Act” for “Contract Work Hours Standards Act” in section catchline and “United States Claims Court” for “Court of Claims” in text.Pub. L. 97–1641962— amended section generally, substituting “Liquidated damages withheld from contractors under Contract Work Hours Standards Act” for “Penalties imposed against contractors under eight hour law” in section catchline, and “liquidated damages withheld from a contractor or subcontractor under section 104 of the Contract Work Hours Standards Act” for “a penalty withheld from a contractor or subcontractor under ” in text.Pub. L. 87–581section 324 of Title 40
Effective Date of 1992 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 102–572section 911 of Pub. L. 102–572section 171 of this titleOct. 29, 1992
Effective Date of 1982 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 97–164section 402 of Pub. L. 97–164section 171 of this titleOct. 1, 1982

Effective Date of 1962 AmendmentAmendment by effective 60 days after , but shall not affect contracts existing or thereafter entered into pursuant to invitations for bids outstanding on , see , , .Pub. L. 87–581section 204 of Pub. L. 87–58176 Stat. 360Aug. 13, 1962Aug. 13, 1962Aug. 13, 1962

Continued Jurisdiction Upon Claims Under Section 324 of Former Title 40, , , provided that the Court of Claims (now United States Court of Federal Claims) was to continue to have jurisdiction to render judgment upon certain claims for a penalty withheld from a contractor or subcontractor under section 324 of former Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, in connection with any contract subject to that section existing on the date sixty days after , or thereafter entered into pursuant to invitations for bids that were outstanding on .Pub. L. 87–581, title II, § 202(b)76 Stat. 360Aug. 13, 1962Aug. 13, 1962Aug. 13, 1962
